reason: Initialize internal self-use academic writing suite with strict workflow and QA versioning.
Retargeted manuscripts must show target-journal conceptual repositioning, not only reference repair and format conversion.
Sparse-evidence reviews need explicit negative recommendations, stop-rules, and experimentally testable decision points.
QA reports must be wired into strict release gates; observed failures cannot remain advisory.
Learning-event version records must increment from the manifest rather than repeatedly writing the same version.
Project template, runner, and regression tests must be executable before a skill is called complete.
Human-facing README must explain use, learning, versioning, and limits outside the skill package.
Dependencies must be classified as required, recommended, or optional provider before local MCP or cloud deployment.

DC_TCE case revealed 4 gaps: (1) no rule blocking floating/uncited references in reference list; (2) no rule blocking non-reference content in reference list (editor notes, word counts); (3) no rule requiring BIB/RIS sync after manual DOCX edits; (4) no guidance on marking citation abstract verification as CANNOT_VERIFY_IN_SANDBOX when sandbox network is blocked — previously marked as hard FAIL causing misleading gate status.
sections_changed: Evidence and Reference QA — added 4 block conditions
Citation Abstract Verification in Network-Constrained Environments — new section

reason: Mode B Step 5 did not explicitly require floating reference audit or BIB/RIS sync check. Non-Skippable Outputs did not include floating reference audit as a required deliverable. Both gaps discovered during DC_TCE Mode B execution (23 uncited refs, 4 editor notes in ref list, BIB not updated after manual ref replacements).
sections_changed: Mode B Step 5 — expanded to include floating ref audit and BIB sync
Non-Skippable Outputs — added floating reference audit

reason: Citation QA second pass: removed 4 weak/misplaced citations (Ref 33 EpCAM BiTE, Ref 19 MM bispecifics, Ref 34 CAR-macrophage, Ref 47 DC tolerance from cross-presentation sentence); deleted refs 19/33/34 from reference list (no evidential home); cited Ref 47 (Troise DC tolerance) at DC chassis intro sentence; full renumbering from 49 to 46 refs; all 46 refs verified cited in body

Three new gate sections: (1) AI Writing Style Detection with 4 marker categories (structural, lexical, epistemic, sentence rhythm) and machine threshold; (2) Multi-Expert Reviewer QA blocking on unresolved MAJOR findings; (3) Citation Insertion Pre-Commit Checklist with relevance tier (EVIDENTIAL/TOPICAL/REVIEW); (4) Reference Renumbering Integrity check; completed truncated Citation Abstract Verification section

Mode B Step 5: added citation pre-commit checklist and renumbering integrity requirement; Step 6: explicit AI marker list and insynbio_polishing.py invocation; Step 10: multi-expert sign-off gate (block if any MAJOR unresolved, statistician <7/10); Non-Skippable Outputs: added citation pre-commit log, floating ref audit, multi-expert resolution summary, AI style scan report

Two paragraph structure errors fixed: (1) Limitations content (formal toxicity assessment, cytokine panel absence, NCG caveat) was embedded mid-Results-3.7 paragraph — removed; H&E sentence properly closed with (Figure 10). (2) Limitation 5 (lentiviral) and Limitation 6 (CI reporting) were fused into one paragraph with a broken sentence splice ('...tissue-specific promoters Sixth...') — split into two properly formed paragraphs.

MAJOR REDESIGN based on post-mortem of 6-version churn on DC_TCE. Root causes: (1) PARTIAL step status allowed workflow to advance without meeting exit criteria; (2) audit document written retrospectively at B10 instead of maintained as living gate document; (3) no read-back step after DOCX edits; (4) expert review run on intermediate version not final version; (5) citation insertion had no pre-commit check enforced in real-time. Fixes: each step now has explicit binary exit criteria; PARTIAL eliminated; read-back required after B5 and B9; expert review moved to B9; audit document is prospective living gate doc.

summary: REDESIGN v2 — 4-phase Scan-First·Edit-Once structure. Phase 1: archive+lock. Phase 2: all scans read-only → Issue Registry. Phase 3: single edit session in fixed order (A:non-ref delete → B:ref delete+renumber → C:structure+format → D:ref insert pre-commit → E:content → F:AI style), read-back after each step. Phase 4: figure contracts + expert review + release gate. Target: original → 1 revised version → submission.
